markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.170 — “Person with a disability which limits or impairs the ability to walk” defined.

“Person with a disability which limits or impairs the ability to walk” has the meaning ascribed to it in NRS 482.3835 .

subsections.text: “Person with a disability which limits or impairs the ability to walk” has the meaning ascribed to it in NRS 482.3835 .
